unemployed.name: Unemployed
unemployed.description: No particular profession. You start with no special skills but can learn anything.

chef.name: Chef
chef.description: Kitchen expertise grants knife skills and knowledge of ingredients.

paramedic.name: Paramedic
paramedic.description: Emergency medical training with field triage and self-defense.

park_ranger.name: Park Ranger
park_ranger.description: Wilderness survival specialist with tracking and marksmanship.

security_guard.name: Security Guard
security_guard.description: Trained in physical confrontation and basic firearm handling.

dock_worker.name: Dock Worker
dock_worker.description: Years on the waterfront built brute strength and fishing know-how.

mechanic.name: Mechanic
mechanic.description: Hands-on technical skills with tools and improvised repairs.

soldier.name: Soldier
soldier.description: Military training grants combat proficiency and tactical discipline.

private_investigator.name: Private Investigator
private_investigator.description: A professional tracker and sleuth. You find what others want hidden.

criminal.name: Criminal
criminal.description: Street smarts and quick hands are your trade. The law is merely a suggestion.
